text: {player1}: have you ever been caught doing something you shouldn't? Spill or drink {medium}.
{player1}: what's something you've done that no one in this room knows about?
{player1}: name someone you've blocked and why. Drink {sip} for courage first.
{player1}: what's the most recent lie you've told? Tell us or drink {large}.
{player1}: if you had to delete one person from your life — who here would it be? Drink {sip} before answering.
{player1}: play the group your last voice note or drink {max}.
{player1}: how many people in this room have you had a crush on? Drink {sip} for each.
Everyone take {sip} — if you claim you haven't lied this week, take {medium} instead.
{player1}: show the group your most recent text conversation. Read it aloud or drink {large}.
{player1}: show the group your most recent photo. Explain it or drink {medium}.
{player1}: read your last DM out loud, or drink {max}.
{player1}: ask {player2} any question you want. They must answer honestly or take {max}.
{player1}: if {player2} killed someone, would you help hide the body? Give out {large} if yes. If not, you take them.
{player1}: who do you think always gets the drunkest fastest — {player2} or someone else here? They take {max}.
{player1}: if you know all of {player2}'s names (first, middle, last) — they take {sip}. If not, you take it.
{player1}: if you can name 2 reasons {player2} will be allowed into heaven, give out {small}. If not, you take them.
{player1}: who do you think would be more likely to go out to a nightclub alone — {player2} or someone else here? They take {small}.
Out of {player1} and {player2}, whoever has spent the most time single can give out {small}.
{player1}: what's the most illegal thing you've ever done? Tell us or drink {medium}.
{player1}: who in this room would you least want to see you naked? Drink {sip} before answering.
{player1}: what's one thing you've done that would make your mum disown you?
{player1}: what's the weirdest dream you've had in the last month?
{player1}: what's the pettiest thing you've ever done for revenge? Tell us or drink {max}.
{player1}: who in this room would you least want as your roommate and why? Drink {sip} first.
Round the circle: most awkward first date story. Group votes the best one — winner gives out {medium}.
{player1}: what's one thing you've done that would get you cancelled if everyone knew?
{player1}: what's the weirdest dream you've had about someone in this room?
{player1}: what would your group chat say about you behind your back?
Round the circle: everyone shares their most embarrassing memory. Group votes the most cringe-worthy — winner gives out {medium}.
{player1}: if you've ever slept in all your clothes because you were too drunk, take {medium}. If not, give them out.
{player1}: who do you think would be more skillful helping a horse give birth — {player2} or someone else here? They can give out {small}.
{player1}: who do you think is more likely to sit on a hen's eggs until they hatch — {player2} or someone else? Mother Hen takes {small}.
{player1}: who would you choose to give you a bed bath — {player2} or someone else here? Your chosen nurse can give out {large}.
{player1} and {player2}: if either of you has been baptised, you both take {max}. If not, choose a player to take them.
{player1}: what's the shadiest thing you've ever done? No lying. Drink {sip} first for courage.
{player1}: what's the most ridiculous lie you've told to get out of something? Tell or drink {max}.
{player1}: describe your most embarrassing wardrobe malfunction in detail or drink {max}.
Drink {sip} if your current partner is the best in bed you've ever had. (If they're not — we advise you to pretend!)
Drink {sip} if your last ex was the best in bed you've ever had.
If you've ever had sex on public transport — {take_or_give_small}.
If you've slept with 2 different people on the same day — {take_or_give_small}.
If you've ever spit on someone — {take_or_give_small}.
